creator: yatt@msc.biglobe.ne.jp
text:
Latest version of TiMidity++ is 2.9.2. Please use this patch
instead of previous one. This includes some minor fix.

Yoichi ASAI <yatt@msc.biglobe.ne.jp>

diff -urN timidity++.orig/Makefile timidity++/Makefile
--- timidity++.orig/Makefile	Sun Apr 16 22:08:23 2000
+++ timidity++/Makefile	Sun Apr 16 22:25:01 2000
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	timidity++
-PORTVERSION=	2.9.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.9.2
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.goice.co.jp/member/mo/timidity/dist/
 DISTNAME=	TiMidity++-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -55,11 +55,12 @@
 .endif
 
 post-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/man/ja/man1 ${PREFIX}/man/ja/man1
+	@${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/man/ja/man1 ${PREFIX}/man/ja/man5
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/ja_JP.ujis/timidity.1 \
 	${PREFIX}/man/ja/man1
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/doc/ja_JP.ujis/timidity.cfg.5 \
 	${PREFIX}/man/ja/man5
+	${GZIP_CMD} ${PREFIX}/man/ja/man1/timidity.1 ${PREFIX}/man/ja/man5/timidity.cfg.5
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
 .for lang in ${DOCLANG}
 	@${MKDIR} \
diff -urN timidity++.orig/files/md5 timidity++/files/md5
--- timidity++.orig/files/md5	Sun Apr 16 22:08:23 2000
+++ timidity++/files/md5	Sun Apr 16 22:10:21 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (timidity/TiMidity++-2.9.0.tar.bz2) = 9a2e7eb5e7a7d9a1ff3c19a65b748b11
+MD5 (timidity/TiMidity++-2.9.2.tar.bz2) = 9604203811d930e7ed87cb44f29dc42e
diff -urN timidity++.orig/pkg/PLIST timidity++/pkg/PLIST
--- timidity++.orig/pkg/PLIST	Sun Apr 16 22:08:23 2000
+++ timidity++/pkg/PLIST	Sun Apr 16 22:23:20 2000
@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@
 bin/timidity
+man/ja/man1/timidity.1.gz
+man/ja/man5/timidity.cfg.5.gz
 share/doc/timidity/C/README.dl
 share/doc/timidity/C/README.sf
 share/doc/timidity/ja/README.dl
